events.title: Record-Breaking 25-Hour Senate Filibuster
events.description: Sen. Booker delivered a record-breaking filibuster speech on the Senate floor opposing Trump administration cuts to Medicaid and social programs. The speech went viral nationally.

press_clips.headline: Cory Booker Filibusters for 25 Hours in Senate
Booker ends record-setting filibuster

events.title: Las Vegas Progressive Rally
events.description: Sen. Booker headlined a major progressive rally in Las Vegas drawing thousands, with strong turnout from Nevada labor unions and progressive activists.
